notableEvents.label: John Rave pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: John Rave called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Blaze Jordan GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Jordan grounds into a double play, pitcher Stephen Kolek to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Jimmy Crooks out at 2nd. Blaze Jordan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas singles on a ground ball to shortstop Masyn Winn. Lane Thomas to 2nd. Lane Thomas advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Masyn Winn.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
